name: Cash+ Visa Signature Card
perks: 5% cash back on your first $2,000 in combined eligible purchases each quarter in two categories you choose
5% cash back on prepaid air, hotel, and car reservations booked directly in the Rewards Travel Center
2% cash back on one everyday category such as gas stations, grocery stores, or restaurants
1% cash back on all other eligible purchases
0% intro APR for 15 billing cycles on purchases and balance transfers
$200 cash back after spending $1,000 in first 120 days
drawbacks: 5% rate capped at $2,000 combined purchases per quarter
Must actively choose and change 5% categories each quarter or rate drops to 1%
No sign-up bonus beyond intro offer
U.S. Bank app and website less intuitive than top competitors
